summary: Ran translate review (double-language re-check skill) on all 10 batch works in fresh composer-2.5 sessions with a structural guard that reverts any row-count/seg-number/src-echo drift to backup so only translations change.

Found major legacy misalignment (off-by-one/shift) plus hard errors: rows fixed per work 18/7/12/7/76/105/2/122/231/86. Spot-check confirmed real alignment+hard-error fixes, not style churn (the 2-row work left 720 rows untouched; a possessor and a hallucinated word were the only fixes).

Republished all 10 with ENTITY_STORE= empty (legacy jobs were prepared without entities; default ENTITY_STORE quarantines on task_digest mismatch). Study re-rendered from the new translations; verify ok=true for all 10.

Rebuilt zh+study collection on feat/study-collection (study code unmerged; data/ shared) and synced GDrive as 中文+陪读 (SHA-matched, 陪读 now carries the review fixes); removed a 日中对照 accidentally re-added by an old-code build on chore. Confirmed corrected aligned text present in the 陪读 epub.

summary: User spot-checked 27104161 陪读 and found a translation misalignment (seg110-113: each row held the previous segment's translation, the long 長乳 sentence lost its translation) plus a stray ビキニ kana residue on seg108. Fixed manually, then ran a full composer-2.5 translate review (structural guard) which caught a SECOND shift (seg116-118), a title mistranslation (おっぱい筋力トレーニング rendered as 乳交), and ぼっちゃま mis-rendered as 胖次酱 on seg120/125.

Diagnosed the annotation-quality complaint as a GUIDE (prompt) issue, not model capability: added two rules to annotation-guide.md — 中日 same-form same-meaning words (質量/監視/成果...) get reading only not meaning; grammar incl. honorific/compound patterns (なさらないでください) must be annotated even inside long sentences.

Re-annotated 27104161 with composer-2.5 under the improved guide (353 segments, 0 skeleton failures); confirmed 質量(しつりょう) reading-only and 勘違い(かんちがい・误会)なさらないで(なさる=する敬语;〜ないでください:请别…) grammar now present.

Republished translation (default ENTITY_STORE — this Codex work's job WAS prepared with entities, unlike the 10 batch works that need ENTITY_STORE= empty) + annotation (PRODUCER_PRIORITY=composer-2.5,codex), re-rendered study, verify ok. Rebuilt zh,study collection on feat/study-collection and synced GDrive; verified the 陪读 epub shows aligned translation + improved annotation for 27104161.
OPEN Q1: the other 24 works still carry pre-guide-fix annotations (redundant same-form meanings, thinner grammar). Awaiting user decision on re-annotating all 24.
